form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1850m after showing early pace at Marburg, beaten 1.4 m by Keayang Tara (2:18.30) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on April 5 at $2.80. Leading contender again.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1660m after showing early pace at Albion Park beaten 4 m by Copy Writer (2:03.00) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 30 at $7. Before that, 4th (Sr1) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 14 m by Jilliby Panda (2:17.40) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 15 at $8. Strong claims on what we have seen lately.
